summary: Tested replacement of window.confirm and alert with modern modals and toast notifications in admin panel. Found and fixed 2 issues: 1) Duplicate useToast declaration in CategoriesTab.js causing compilation error, 2) Remaining confirm() call in DeliverySettingsTab.js. All admin tabs now use proper modals for confirmation dialogs.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: CategoriesTab.js had duplicate 'const { toast } = useToast();' declaration on lines 29 and 45, causing 'Identifier toast has already been declared' error
FIXED: DeliverySettingsTab.js had remaining confirm() call on line 472 in handleProcessUndelivered function - replaced with ProcessUndeliveredModal component
All admin tabs now properly use modals for delete/ban/action confirmations: SellersTab, UsersTab, DeliveryTab, CategoriesTab, CouponsTab, DailyDealsTab, DeliverySettingsTab
Toast notifications are properly implemented via useToast hook for success/error feedback

SellersTab.notes: Uses actionModal state for delete/ban confirmation modals

UsersTab.notes: Uses actionModal state for delete/ban confirmation modals

DeliveryTab.notes: Uses actionModal state for delete/ban confirmation modals, RejectModal for rejection

CategoriesTab.notes: Uses deleteModal state for delete confirmation. Fixed duplicate useToast declaration.

CouponsTab.notes: Uses deleteModal state and DeleteModal component for delete confirmation

DailyDealsTab.notes: Uses deleteModal state for delete confirmation modal

DeliverySettingsTab.notes: Added ProcessUndeliveredModal to replace confirm() call. Uses toast for save notifications.

fixes_applied.issue: Duplicate 'const { toast } = useToast();' declaration causing compilation error

fixes_applied.fix: Added processUndeliveredModal state, ProcessUndeliveredModal component, and updated button to open modal instead of calling confirm()

context_for_next_testing_agent: All window.confirm and alert calls have been replaced with modern modals and toast notifications in admin panel. CategoriesTab.js and DeliverySettingsTab.js were fixed during this testing iteration. No remaining confirm() or alert() calls in admin components.
